description: Binary market on a Russia-Ukraine ceasefire by April 30, 2026. At 3.9% with $950K volume, pricing one month of additional negotiation time vs the March 31 market (0.5%). Part of a temporal cluster showing how probability increases with time horizon.
question: Will Russia and Ukraine reach a ceasefire by April 30, 2026?

resolution_logic.summary: Resolves Yes if an official ceasefire agreement — a publicly announced and mutually agreed halt in military engagement — is reached between Russia and Ukraine by April 30, 2026 11:59 PM ET.

triggers.description: Official ceasefire agreement announced by both Russia and Ukraine, or consensus of credible media reporting
triggers.source: Official announcements from Russia and Ukraine

exclusions: Partial ceasefires (energy infrastructure, Black Sea only)
Frameworks without explicit dated halt in fighting
resolution_logic.ambiguity_notes: A peace deal qualifies only if it includes a publicly announced halt effective on a specific date. Agreement must be reached by deadline; actual ceasefire can start later.

catalyst_dates.event: March 31 ceasefire market resolves — price signal for April

cross_platform_link.structural_notes: Kalshi has no Russia-Ukraine ceasefire markets. Coverage gap.

related_markets.notes: Ceasefire by March 31 at 0.5% — nearest-term variant
Ceasefire by June 30 at 15% — two-month extension
